title: Indicator
description: A single policy indicator value for a specific geography and time period.

geoid.description: FIPS code for the geography. Zero-padded: 2-digit state, 5-digit county, 11-digit tract, 12-digit block group.

indicator_id.description: Unique snake_case identifier for the indicator.

year.description: Data vintage year (or end year for multi-year ACS estimates).

value.description: The indicator value. null indicates missing or suppressed data — never use sentinel values.

moe.description: Margin of error at 90% confidence level (ACS estimates). null if not applicable or unavailable.

cv.description: Coefficient of variation (moe / 1.645 / value * 100). Measures estimate reliability. null if not applicable.

source_id.description: Key into data/sources.toml identifying the upstream data source.

source_table.description: Source-specific table, series, or measure identifier.

percentile_rank.description: Percentile rank relative to all geographies at the same level and year (0–100). null if fewer than 5 peers exist.

z_score.description: Z-score relative to peer geographies at the same level and year. null if peers < 5.

suppressed.description: True if the source agency suppressed this value for privacy (e.g., small sample size). value will be null when true.

flags.description: Data quality flags from the source or ingest pipeline.

fetched_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record was fetched from the upstream source.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record was last updated in the database.
